description: Update README.md to reflect all new features (Kids Day, DND-Modus, Dokumenten-Hub, Timeline/Ablaufplan, Event-Timeline-Export), update test counts, and maintain pitch-relevant tone.
steps: In README.md, update the 'Was die Plattform kann' section under 'Leitstand (Management, Desktop)' to mention: Kids Day Leitstand (Familientag-Modus mit Intensitaetssteuerung), Ablaufplan/Master-Timeline (Bloecke, Verzoegerungspropagation, Versionierung, Freeze), Dokumenten-Hub (zentrale Event-Dokumente mit Kategorien und Sichtbarkeitssteuerung), Event-Timeline-Export (chronologischer Gesamtexport als JSON/HTML/CSV).
In the 'Scare Actor (Phone)' section, add mention of DND-Modus (Nicht-stoeren-Modus waehrend Position, filtert unwichtige Benachrichtigungen).

Update the test count references: change '125 API-End-to-End-Checks' to '241 API-End-to-End-Checks' in the Schnellstart section. Update the '47 Browser-E2E-Checks' reference to '62+ Browser-E2E-Checks' (reflecting the 15+ new ones). Also update the Struktur section test line if it mentions counts.

In the Struktur section, update the modules count from '18 Fachmodule' to '23 Fachmodule' (count: announce, auth, backup, breaks, carpool, catering, chat, checklists, csv, dbadmin, dnd, documents, incidents, kidsday, live, mazes, people, reports, schedule, settings, tasks, timeline, timeline-versions = 23).
Add a brief mention of the load test in the testing section: 'Lasttests: server/test/load.mjs (150+ gleichzeitige SSE-Verbindungen + parallele API-Calls)'.
Keep the pitch-relevant tone and formatting consistent with existing style.
acceptance_criteria: README.md mentions Kids Day, DND-Modus, Dokumenten-Hub, Ablaufplan/Timeline, Event-Timeline-Export
Test counts are updated to 241+ and 62+
verification: Read README.md and confirm all new features are mentioned
Verify the test and module counts are accurate
findings: All 241 tests pass. README updated with Kids Day, DND-Modus, Dokumenten-Hub, Ablaufplan/Master-Timeline, Event-Timeline-Export. Test counts corrected to 241/66, module count to 23, load test added to Betrieb section.
